VSTCameraRotation.description:
Camera rotation offset. Quaternions are preferred when present; Euler
angles are retained for import of older scenario JSON.

YAW_DEG.description: Yaw angle in degrees for Euler-angle camera imports.

PITCH_DEG.description: Pitch angle in degrees for Euler-angle camera imports.

ROLL_DEG.description: Roll angle in degrees for Euler-angle camera imports.

QUATERNION_X.description: Quaternion x component for camera orientation.

QUATERNION_Y.description: Quaternion y component for camera orientation.

QUATERNION_Z.description: Quaternion z component for camera orientation.

QUATERNION_W.description: Quaternion w component for camera orientation.

USES_QUATERNION.description: True when quaternion fields define the authoritative rotation.

VSTDisplaySettings.description: App display toggles for a scenario viewer.

MAP_MODE.description: Active map rendering mode for the scenario viewer.

SHOW_GIF_CONTROLS.description: Show animated capture or GIF export controls.

SHOW_ATMOSPHERE.description: Render the atmospheric shell around the central body.

USE_STITCHED_ORBIT.description: Render orbits as stitched continuous paths.

VSTCameraOptions.description: Camera options for a space-domain scenario viewer.

CAMERA_FRAME_MODE.description: Camera frame relative to the focused target or default scene.

SATELLITE_ALIGNMENT.description: Satellite body alignment mode when focused on a satellite.

DISTANCE_FROM_TARGET_KM.description: Camera distance from the current target in kilometers.

VST.description: Viewer State - display and camera state associated with a scenario.

CAMERA.description: Camera settings for the current viewer state.

DISPLAY_SETTINGS.description: Display toggles and map style for the current viewer state.

FOCUSED_REFERENCE_ID.description: Reference id of the currently focused scenario object.

FOCUSED_REFERENCE_INDEX.description: Zero-based focused reference index, or -1 when no index is focused.

GCRF.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.9 Inertial Earth-centered frame aligned with Earth's center of mass.

ICRF.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.11 International Celestial Reference Frame based on distant quasars.

J2000.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.14 Classical J2000 inertial frame defined at epoch J2000.0.

J2000A.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.15 Updated J2000 frame using IAU2000A precession-nutation models.

EME2000.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.7 Earth Mean Equator frame at epoch J2000 used in orbit determination.

TEMEOFDATE.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.25 True Equator Mean Equinox of Date frame for satellite tracking.

GTOD.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.10 Greenwich True of Date: Earth rotation relative to celestial reference.

CIRS.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.4 Celestial Intermediate Reference System based on CIP and CIO.

MOD_EARTH.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.18 Mean of Date (MOD) Earth frame using IAU1976 precession.

MOD_CB.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.17 Mean of Date (MOD) celestial body frame evaluated at each epoch.

MOD_MOON.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.19 Mean of Date (MOD) Moon frame evaluated at each epoch.

TOD_EARTH.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.29 True of Date (TOD) Earth frame with polar motion included.

TOD_CB.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.28 True of Date (TOD) celestial body frame.

TOD_MOON.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.30 True of Date (TOD) Moon frame.

TOE_EARTH.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.32 True of Epoch (TOE) Earth frame at specific epoch.

TOE_CB.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.31 True of Epoch (TOE) celestial body frame at specific epoch.

TOE_MOON.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.33 True of Epoch (TOE) Moon frame at specific epoch.

EFG.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.6 Earth-Fixed Geocentric frame using geodetic coordinates.

FIXED_CB.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.8 Fixed frame of a celestial body.

FIXED_EARTH.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.39 Fixed Earth frame aligned with WGS84 ellipsoid.

DTRFYYYY.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.5 Dynamic Terrestrial Reference Frame for a given year (DTRFYYYY).

ALIGN_EARTH.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.2 Mean Earth Equator and Equinox (ALIGN_EARTH) frame.

ALIGN_CB.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.1 Mean Central Body Equator and Equinox (ALIGN_CB) frame.

B1950.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.2.3 Classical Besselian 1950 equator and equinox frame.

EQW_INERTIAL.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.3.1 Earth Equatorial Inertial frame aligned with J2000 epoch.

LVLH_INERTIAL.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.3.3 Local Vertical Local Horizontal inertial frame.

LVLH_ROTATING.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.3.2 Local Vertical Local Horizontal rotating frame.

NSW_INERTIAL.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.3.5 Normal along-track cross-track inertial frame.

NSW_ROTATING.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.3.4 Normal along-track cross-track rotating frame.

NTW_INERTIAL.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.3.7 Orbit normal Tangential cross-track inertial frame.

NTW_ROTATING.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.3.6 Orbit normal Tangential cross-track rotating frame.

PQW_INERTIAL.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.3.8 Perifocal frame aligned with orbit's perigee.

RSW_INERTIAL.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.3.10 Radial along-track cross-track inertial frame.

RSW_ROTATING.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.3.9 Radial along-track cross-track rotating frame.

TNW_INERTIAL.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.3.12 Transverse normal cross-track inertial frame.

TNW_ROTATING.description: OID: 1.3.112.4.57.3.11 Transverse normal cross-track rotating frame.

ECEF.description: Earth-Centered-Earth-Fixed: Rotates with Earth. X-axis at prime meridian, Y eastward, Z towards North Pole.

TEME.description: True Equator Mean Equinox of Date, same as TEMEOFDATE: Dynamic frame for SGP4 satellite tracking.

TEMEOFEPOCH.description: True Equator Mean Equinox of Epoch: Static version of TEMEOFDATE at a given epoch.

ENU.description: East-North-Up: Local tangent plane for surface points.

NED.description: North-East-Down: Aviation/navigation frame aligned with gravity.

NEU.description: North-East-Up: Local tangent plane variant with Up positive.

RIC.description: Radial-Intrack-Cross-track: Spacecraft orientation aligned with orbit.

RTN.description: Radial-Transverse-Normal: Orbit frame for spacecraft dynamics.

VVLH.description: Vehicle-Velocity-Local-Horizontal: Orbit frame aligned with velocity vector.

LTP.description: Local Tangent Plane: Surface-fixed frame centered on a point.

LVLH.description: Local Vertical-Local Horizontal: Z axis towards Earth center, X along velocity.

BRF.description: Body-Fixed Reference Frame: Fixed to a spacecraft or celestial object.

PolarizationType.description: Different types of polarization in EMT

DataMode.description: Enum for the mode of data (real, simulated, synthetic)

EXERCISE.description: Data collected during an exercise scenario.

RF_ANALYZER.description: Radio frequency analysis and measurement device

LASER_IMAGING.description: Optical Devices Device for laser-based imaging

SCLK.description: Spacecraft Clock (receiver) (requires rules for interpretation in ICD)

GNSS_WEEK_SECONDS.description: GNSS week number plus seconds within the week.

CCSDS_TIME_CODE.description: CCSDS binary time-code field with preamble metadata.

MISSION_ELAPSED_SECONDS.description: Seconds from an application-defined mission epoch.

INVALID_INPUT.description: Input epoch or requested representation is invalid.

UNSUPPORTED_TIME_SYSTEM.description: Requested source or target time system is not supported.

LEAP_SECOND_DATA_REQUIRED.description: Conversion requires leap-second data that was not available.

EOP_DATA_REQUIRED.description: Conversion requires Earth-orientation data that was not available.

OUT_OF_RANGE.description: Requested instant is outside the supported conversion range.

SGP4XP.description: Simplified General Perturbation Model 4 eXtended Perturbations (https://amostech.com/TechnicalPapers/2022/Astrodynamics/Payne_2.pdf)

SiteType.description: Enum for the type of site

scenarioReferenceKind.description: record, a variable placeholder, or a visual annotation.

stateRequestKind.description: State request kind for a control-message request/response pair.

assetCatalogTab.description: Asset catalog tab requested by a host or embedded scenario controls surface.

FrequencyRange.description: Frequency range with lower and upper limits

U.description: Another linear polarization, orthogonal to Q

StokesParameters.description: Stokes parameters, representing different aspects of polarization

Band.description: Table representing a frequency band with a name and frequency range

DATA_MODE.description: Mode of the data (real, simulated, synthetic)

EXERCISE.description: Data collected during an exercise scenario.

POWER_TYPE.description: Type of power (eg. AC or DC)

TRANSMIT.description: Indicates if the EMT can transmit

RECEIVE.description: Indicates if the EMT can receive

LASER_INSTRUMENT.description: Specialized Scientific Instruments Device for laser-based experiments and measurements

RF_ANALYZER.description: Radio frequency analysis and measurement device

LASER_IMAGING.description: Optical Devices Device for laser-based imaging

TASKABLE.description: Indicates if the site is taskable

CLASSIFICATION.description: Classification marking of the data in IC/CAPCO Portion-marked format.

OB_TIME.description: Ob detection time in ISO 8601 UTC (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.ssssssZ), up to microsecond precision.

CORR_QUALITY.description: Correlation score of the observation when compared to a known orbit state.

ID_ON_ORBIT.description: Server will auto-populate with SAT_NO if available.

SENSOR_ID.description: Unique ID of the sensor. Must have a corresponding sensor record on the server.

NORAD_CAT_ID.description: 18SDS satellite number. Only list if correlated against the 18SDS catalog.

TASK_ID.description: Identifier for the collectRequest message if the collection was in response to tasking.

TRANSACTION_ID.description: Optional identifier to track a transaction.

IMAGE_SET_ID.description: The user-defined set ID of a sequence of images.

IMAGE_SET_LENGTH.description: The number of images in an image set.

SEQUENCE_ID.description: The sequence ID of an image within an image set.

OB_POSITION.description: The position of this observation within a track (FENCE, FIRST, IN, LAST, SINGLE).

ORIG_OBJECT_ID.description: Provider maintained ID. May not be consistent with 18SDS SAT_NO.

UCT.description: Required if correlation is attempted. Indicates whether correlation succeeded.

AZIMUTH.description: Line of sight azimuth angle in degrees and topocentric frame.

AZIMUTH_UNC.description: One sigma uncertainty in the line of sight azimuth angle, in degrees.

AZIMUTH_BIAS.description: Sensor line of sight azimuth angle bias in degrees.

AZIMUTH_RATE.description: Rate of change of the line of sight azimuth in degrees per second.

ELEVATION.description: Line of sight elevation in degrees and topocentric frame.

ELEVATION_UNC.description: One sigma uncertainty in the line of sight elevation angle, in degrees.

ELEVATION_BIAS.description: Sensor line of sight elevation bias in degrees.

ELEVATION_RATE.description: Rate of change of the line of sight elevation in degrees per second.

RANGE.description: Line of sight range in km. Reported value should include all applicable corrections.

RANGE_UNC.description: One sigma uncertainty in the line of sight range, in km.

RANGE_BIAS.description: Sensor line of sight range bias in km.

RANGE_RATE.description: Range rate in km/s. Reported value should include all applicable corrections.

RANGE_RATE_UNC.description: One sigma uncertainty in the line of sight range rate, in km/sec.

RA.description: Right ascension in degrees. Required metric reporting field for EO observations.

RA_RATE.description: Line of sight right ascension rate of change, in degrees/sec.

RA_UNC.description: One sigma uncertainty in the line of sight right ascension angle, in degrees.

RA_BIAS.description: Sensor line of sight right ascension bias in degrees.

DECLINATION.description: Declination in degrees. Required metric reporting field for EO observations.

DECLINATION_RATE.description: Line of sight declination rate of change, in degrees/sec.

DECLINATION_UNC.description: One sigma uncertainty in the line of sight declination angle, in degrees.

DECLINATION_BIAS.description: Sensor line of sight declination angle bias in degrees.

LOSX.description: X-component of the unit vector representing the line-of-sight direction in the observer's reference frame.

LOSY.description: Y-component of the unit vector representing the line-of-sight direction in the observer's reference frame.

LOSZ.description: Z-component of the unit vector representing the line-of-sight direction in the observer's reference frame.

LOS_UNC.description: One sigma uncertainty in the line-of-sight direction vector components.

LOSXVEL.description: X-component of the velocity vector along the line of sight, in km/s.

LOSYVEL.description: Y-component of the velocity vector along the line of sight, in km/s.

LOSZVEL.description: Z-component of the velocity vector along the line of sight, in km/s.

SENLAT.description: WGS-84 latitude in decimal degrees at the time of the observation.

SENLON.description: WGS-84 longitude in decimal degrees at the time of the observation.

SENALT.description: Sensor height in km relative to the WGS-84 ellipsoid at the time of the observation.

SENX.description: Cartesian X position in km at the time of the observation.

SENY.description: Cartesian Y position in km at the time of the observation.

SENZ.description: Cartesian Z position in km at the time of the observation.

FOV_COUNT.description: Total number of satellites in the field of view.

FOV_COUNT_UCTS.description: Number of uncorrelated satellites in the field of view (JCO).

EXP_DURATION.description: observations are going to be used for photometric processing.

NET_OBJ_SIG_UNC.description: Net object signature uncertainty = counts uncertainty / EXP_DURATION.

MAG.description: Measure of observed brightness calibrated against the Gaia G-band.

GEOLAT.description: and corresponding viewing geometry. It must NOT be computed from the orbit state.

GEOLON.description: and viewing geometry. It must NOT be computed from the orbit state.

GEOALT.description: Computed estimate of satellite altitude in km at the reported location. It must NOT be computed from the orbit state.

GEORANGE.description: Computed estimate of the slant range in km. It must NOT be computed from the orbit state.

SKY_BKGRND.description: empty part of the night sky.

PRIMARY_EXTINCTION_UNC.description: Primary Extinction Coefficient Uncertainty, in Magnitudes.

SOLAR_PHASE_ANGLE.description: calculation listed in the EOSSA documentation, pg 106 of the EOSSA spec.

SOLAR_EQ_PHASE_ANGLE.description: and positive when opening (after the opposition).

SOLAR_DEC_ANGLE.description: Angle from the sun to the equatorial plane.

RAW_FILE_URI.description: Optional URI location in the document repository of the raw file parsed by the system to produce this record.

INTENSITY.description: Intensity of the target for IR observations, in kw/sr/em.

BG_INTENSITY.description: Background intensity for IR observations, in kw/sr/um.

DESCRIPTOR.description: Optional source-provided and searchable metadata or descriptor of the data.

ORIGIN.description: the data on behalf of the origin system. If null, the source may be assumed to be the origin.

DATA_MODE.description: Indicator of whether the data is EXERCISE, REAL, SIMULATED, or TEST.

EXERCISE.description: Data collected during an exercise scenario.

CREATED_AT.description: Time the row was created in the database, auto-populated by the system.

CREATED_BY.description: Application user who created the row in the database, auto-populated by the system.

REFERENCE_FRAME.description: EO observations are assumed to be topocentric J2000 coordinates ('J2000') as defined by the IAU, unless otherwise specified.

SEN_REFERENCE_FRAME.description: Lat / long / height values should be reported using the WGS-84 ellipsoid, where applicable.

UMBRA.description: Boolean indicating that the target object was in umbral eclipse at the time of this observation.

PENUMBRA.description: This field is highly recommended if the observations will be used for photometric processing.

ORIG_NETWORK.description: The originating source network on which this record was created, auto-populated by the system.

SOURCE_DL.description: The source from which this record was received.

UNKNOWN.description: Basic and General Sensors Basic or undefined sensor type

INFRARED_SENSOR.description: Electromagnetic Spectrum Sensors Detects infrared radiation

RADAR.description: Radar and Radio Telescopes Basic radar systems

PHASED_ARRAY_RADAR.description: Advanced radar with phased array technology

BISTATIC_RADIO_TELESCOPE.description: For astronomical observations using bistatic setup

ATMOSPHERIC_SENSOR.description: Environmental and Atmospheric Sensors For atmospheric studies

SEISMIC_SENSOR.description: Specialized Scientific Sensors For measuring seismic activities

LIDAR.description: Advanced Optical and Imaging Sensors Light Detection and Ranging

MULTISPECTRAL_SENSOR.description: Capturing image data at multiple wavelengths

HYPERSPECTRAL_SENSOR.description: Advanced imaging across many spectral bands

GPS_RECEIVER.description: Positioning and Tracking Sensors For Global Positioning System reception

RADIO_COMMUNICATIONS.description: Communication Devices Standard radio communication device

LASER_INSTRUMENT.description: Specialized Scientific Instruments Device for laser-based experiments and measurements

RF_ANALYZER.description: Radio frequency analysis and measurement device

LASER_IMAGING.description: Optical Devices Device for laser-based imaging

AZIMUTH_MEASURED.description: True if measured, false if computed. Required if azimuth is reported.

ELEVATION_MEASURED.description: True if measured, false if computed. Required if elevation is reported.

RANGE_MEASURED.description: True if measured, false if computed. Required if range is reported.

RANGERATE_MEASURED.description: True if measured, false if computed. Required if range-rate is reported.

RA_MEASURED.description: True if measured, false if computed. Required if right ascension is reported.

DECLINATION_MEASURED.description: True if measured, false if computed. Required if declination is reported.

NIIRS.description: National Imagery Interpretability Rating Scale (NIIRS). Ranging from 0 (lowest) to 9 (highest).

METERS_PER_PIXEL.description: Ground sample distance in meters per pixel.

IMAGE_SNR.description: Signal-to-noise ratio of the image. Higher values indicate cleaner imagery.

IMAGE_WIDTH.description: Width of the image in pixels.

IMAGE_HEIGHT.description: Height of the image in pixels.

IMAGE_COMPRESSION.description: Compression type used for the image, e.g., "JPEG", "PNG", "RAW", etc.

IMAGE_COMPRESSION_RATIO.description: Compression ratio used (original size / compressed size), if applicable.

PROCESSED_IMAGE_URI.description: URI to the processed image used for this observation.

IMAGE_AUTO_ENHANCED.description: Flag indicating whether the image was auto-enhanced (e.g., contrast stretch, denoise).

MULTI_FRAME_STACKED.description: True if the observation was taken with multiple frames stacked into one image.

SYNTHETIC_TRACKING_USED.description: True if synthetic tracking was used to create the image.

IMAGE_SHARPNESS.description: Sharpness metric of the image based on the Tenengrad method or variance of Laplacian. Higher values indicate sharper images.

IMAGE_NOISE_STDDEV.description: Noise level of the image, estimated via pixel intensity variance in background regions.

IMAGE_CONTRAST.description: Contrast metric of the image, such as Michelson contrast or RMS contrast.

IMAGE_DYNAMIC_RANGE.description: Dynamic range of the image (max pixel value / min pixel value), indicating tonal spread.

IMAGE_ENTROPY.description: Entropy of the image, representing the richness of information content. Higher entropy suggests higher texture detail.

BACKGROUND_UNIFORMITY.description: Background uniformity metric (e.g., mean gradient in background areas). Lower values indicate more uniform background.

BACKGROUND_MEAN_LEVEL.description: Mean background level, computed from non-object regions in pixel units.

SATURATED_PIXEL_PERCENT.description: Percentage of saturated pixels in the image. Indicates overexposure when high.

DEAD_PIXEL_PERCENT.description: Percentage of dead or zero-value pixels in the image. Indicates sensor defects or underexposure.

PSF_FWHM.description: Estimated Point Spread Function (PSF) Full Width at Half Maximum (FWHM) in pixels. Indicates image blur or focus.

CLOUD_COVER_PERCENT.description: Estimated percentage of cloud cover in the image. Derived using cloud detection algorithms such as Fmask or machine learning classifiers.

CLOUD_DETECTION_CONFIDENCE.description: Confidence score of the cloud detection result, from 0 (low confidence) to 1 (high confidence).

HAZE_PERCENT.description: Estimated percentage of the image obscured by haze or atmospheric scattering effects.

AEROSOL_OPTICAL_THICKNESS.description: Estimated aerosol optical thickness (AOT) at 550 nm, indicating particulate matter in the atmosphere affecting image clarity.

WATER_VAPOR_CONTENT.description: Estimated water vapor content (e.g., total column precipitable water) at the time of imaging, in mm.

SUN_ELEVATION.description: Sun elevation angle at the time of image capture, in degrees above the horizon.

SUN_AZIMUTH.description: Sun azimuth angle at the time of image capture, in degrees from true north.

VIEW_ZENITH_ANGLE.description: View zenith angle (sensor line-of-sight angle from nadir), in degrees.

VIEW_AZIMUTH_ANGLE.description: View azimuth angle (direction of sensor relative to north), in degrees.

OFF_NADIR_ANGLE.description: Off-nadir angle of the sensor at the time of image capture, in degrees.

SWATH_WIDTH_KM.description: Ground coverage width of the image swath in kilometers.

MEAN_TERRAIN_ELEVATION.description: Mean terrain elevation in the image footprint, in meters above sea level.

TERRAIN_ELEVATION_STDDEV.description: Standard deviation of terrain elevation in the image footprint, in meters.

SHADOW_COVER_PERCENT.description: Percentage of the image affected by shadows, derived via topographic or object shadow detection.

SUNGLINT_PRESENT.description: Flag indicating whether sunglint is present in the image (true if high reflectance from water surface due to sun geometry).

SUNGLINT_PERCENT.description: Percentage of image affected by sunglint.

SNOW_ICE_COVER_PERCENT.description: Estimated percentage of snow or ice coverage in the image footprint.

VALID_DATA_AREA_KM2.description: Total area covered by valid data (non-masked, usable imagery) in square kilometers.

PREAMBLE_FIELD2.description: Second CCSDS preamble field octet; ignored when not signaled by preamble 1.

AGENCY_DEFINED_EPOCH_ISO8601.description: Optional agency-defined epoch timestamp for agency epoch time codes.

CCSDS_EPOCH_ISO8601.description: Optional CCSDS epoch override timestamp; defaults to 1958-01-01T00:00:00 TAI.

TIMCcsdsTimeCode.description: CCSDS time-code payload and preamble metadata.

SCLK.description: Spacecraft Clock (receiver) (requires rules for interpretation in ICD)

EPOCH_FORMAT.description: Interpretation of JULIAN_DATE, SECONDS, and ISO8601.

GNSS_WEEK_SECONDS.description: GNSS week number plus seconds within the week.

CCSDS_TIME_CODE.description: CCSDS binary time-code field with preamble metadata.

MISSION_ELAPSED_SECONDS.description: Seconds from an application-defined mission epoch.

JULIAN_DATE.description: Julian Date or Modified Julian Date day value, selected by EPOCH_FORMAT.

SECONDS.description: Seconds for UNIX_SECONDS, GPS_SECONDS, GNSS_WEEK_SECONDS, or MISSION_ELAPSED_SECONDS.

ISO8601.description: ISO 8601 timestamp text for ISO8601 inputs or display outputs.

SUBSECOND_NANOS.description: Additional nanoseconds beyond the fractional scalar/text value.

EPOCH_LABEL.description: Optional application-defined epoch label for MET, MRT, or SCLK values.

GNSS_WEEK.description: GNSS week number when EPOCH_FORMAT is GNSS_WEEK_SECONDS.

GNSS_ROLLOVER_REFERENCE_ISO8601.description: Optional Orekit-style GNSS week rollover reference timestamp.

CCSDS_TIME_CODE.description: CCSDS time-code payload when EPOCH_FORMAT is CCSDS_TIME_CODE.

TIMInstant.description: Numeric or textual instant tagged with its time system and representation.

SCLK.description: Spacecraft Clock (receiver) (requires rules for interpretation in ICD)

GNSS_WEEK_SECONDS.description: GNSS week number plus seconds within the week.

CCSDS_TIME_CODE.description: CCSDS binary time-code field with preamble metadata.

MISSION_ELAPSED_SECONDS.description: Seconds from an application-defined mission epoch.

TAI_MINUS_UTC_SECONDS.description: Optional TAI-UTC override in seconds for the source instant.

HAS_TAI_MINUS_UTC.description: Whether TAI_MINUS_UTC_SECONDS should override runtime leap-second data.

DUT1_SECONDS.description: Optional UT1-UTC override in seconds for UT1 conversions.

HAS_DUT1.description: Whether DUT1_SECONDS should override runtime Earth-orientation data.

TIMConversionRequest.description: Request to convert one instant into another time system/representation.

DELTA_SECONDS.description: Target minus source offset in SI seconds for the requested conversion.

INVALID_INPUT.description: Input epoch or requested representation is invalid.

UNSUPPORTED_TIME_SYSTEM.description: Requested source or target time system is not supported.

LEAP_SECOND_DATA_REQUIRED.description: Conversion requires leap-second data that was not available.

EOP_DATA_REQUIRED.description: Conversion requires Earth-orientation data that was not available.

OUT_OF_RANGE.description: Requested instant is outside the supported conversion range.

ERROR_MESSAGE.description: Optional error detail when STATUS is not OK.

TRACE_ID.description: Caller trace/correlation identifier copied from the request when present.

TIMConversionResult.description: Result of a time conversion request.

TIME_SYSTEM.description: Legacy time-system selector retained for existing TIM consumers.

SCLK.description: Spacecraft Clock (receiver) (requires rules for interpretation in ICD)

SGP4XP.description: Simplified General Perturbation Model 4 eXtended Perturbations (https://amostech.com/TechnicalPapers/2022/Astrodynamics/Payne_2.pdf)

SCLK.description: Spacecraft Clock (receiver) (requires rules for interpretation in ICD)

SGP4XP.description: Simplified General Perturbation Model 4 eXtended Perturbations (https://amostech.com/TechnicalPapers/2022/Astrodynamics/Payne_2.pdf)

EPOCH.description: EPOCH of Mean Keplerian elements (ISO 8601 UTC format)

SEMI_MAJOR_AXIS.description: Semi-major axis in km or Mean Motion in rev/day

MEAN_MOTION.description: Mean motion in rev/day if MEAN_ELEMENT_THEORY=SGP/SGP4 else unused

BSTAR.description: BSTAR in 1/Earth radii or BTERM in m**2/kg depending on MEAN_ELEMENT_THEORY [C]

MEAN_MOTION_DOT.description: MEAN_MOTION_DOT in rev/day**2 [C if SGP or PPT3]

MEAN_MOTION_DDOT.description: MEAN_MOTION_DDOT in rev/day**3 if SGP/PPT3 or AGOM in m**2/kg if SGP4-XP [C]

COVARIANCE.description: Units: position in km**2, velocity in km**2/s**2, cross in km**2/s

Geometry.description: Geometry table with information about geometric properties

ID.description: Unique identifier for the site, BE_NUMBER

SITE_TYPE.description: Site type as defined in SiteType enum

CTR_ID.description: CTR ISO 3166 Numeric code as string

CREATED_BY.description: Identifier of the user who created the site data

MODEL_URL.description: URL for the 3D model of the site

TASKABLE.description: Indicates if the site is taskable

OPERATIONAL_STATUS.description: Operational status of the site (e.g., active, inactive, under construction)

ALTITUDE.description: Altitude in meters above WGS84 ellipsoid (optional)

HAS_ALTITUDE.description: True if altitude was explicitly provided (distinguishes 0 from absent)

GJNPosition.description: A single position (longitude, latitude, optional altitude)

GJNLinearRing.description: A linear ring is a closed LineString with 4+ positions (first = last)

RINGS.description: Rings: first is outer boundary, rest are holes

GJNPolygonRings.description: A polygon represented as an array of rings (outer boundary + holes)

RINGS.description: Array of position arrays (for MultiLineString, Polygon rings)

POLYGON_RINGS.description: Array of polygons each as array of rings (for MultiPolygon)

NUM_VALUE.description: Property value as number (use if numeric)

IS_NUMERIC.description: True if NUM_VALUE should be used instead of VALUE

IS_BOOL.description: True if this property value is a boolean

BOOL_VALUE.description: Boolean value (use when IS_BOOL is true)

IS_NULL.description: True if this property value is JSON null

JSON_VALUE.description: Raw JSON string for complex values (objects, arrays)

GJNProperty.description: A key-value property entry for Feature properties

NUM_ID.description: Numeric feature identifier (use when ID_IS_NUMERIC is true)

ID_IS_NUMERIC.description: True if the feature id is numeric rather than string

HAS_GEOMETRY.description: True if the feature has a geometry (false means geometry was JSON null)

PROPERTIES_IS_NULL.description: True if properties was JSON null (vs empty object)

HAS_ALTITUDE.description: True if the bbox includes altitude (6 values vs 4)

GJNBoundingBox.description: GeoJSON Bounding Box [west, south, east, north] or [west, south, min-alt, east, north, max-alt]

LINE1.description: First TLE line exactly as imported.

LINE2.description: Second TLE line exactly as imported.

SOURCE.description: Source label or URI for the imported TLE.

SCNTleLines.description: Raw TLE lines retained as import provenance for scenario setup.

ALTITUDE_KM.description: Altitude above the reference ellipsoid in kilometers.

SCNGeodeticPoint.description: Geodetic point in latitude, longitude, altitude order.

NAME.description: Display name for the point of interest.

DESCRIPTION.description: Optional detail text shown with the point of interest.

EPOCH.description: UTC epoch associated with the point of interest.

HIGHLIGHT_BEFORE_SEC.description: Seconds before the epoch when highlighting begins.

HIGHLIGHT_AFTER_SEC.description: Seconds after the epoch when highlighting remains active.

COLOR.description: Display color token for the point of interest.

POSITION.description: Geodetic position for the point of interest.

SCNPointOfInterest.description: Time-tagged point or annotation shown in a scenario.

HALF_ANGLE_DEG.description: Half angle in degrees for cone-style overlays.

DYNAMIC_RANGE.description: Dynamic range mode or expression used by the viewer.

SCNViewCone.description: Sensor or site view-cone overlay used by scenario tools.

TARGET_REFERENCE_ID.description: Scenario reference id of the target object.

TARGET_NORAD_CAT_ID.description: NORAD catalog id of the target satellite when available.

GROUND_SITE_ID.description: Ground site id associated with the target pairing.

LABEL.description: Display label for the exclusion zone.

FILL_COLOR.description: Fill color token for the exclusion zone.

LABEL_COLOR.description: Label color token for the exclusion zone.

IS_FILLED.description: True when the exclusion-zone polygon should be filled.

POINTS.description: Simple geodetic polygon points for imported zones.

BOUNDARY.description: Canonical GeoJSON geometry for the exclusion zone.

SCNExclusionZone.description: Scenario exclusion zone. BOUNDARY carries the canonical geospatial shape when available; POINTS preserves simple LLA polygon imports.

REFERENCE_ID.description: Stable scenario-local id for this reference.

DISPLAY_NAME.description: Human-readable display name for the reference.

REFERENCE_KIND.description: Category of object or annotation represented by this reference.

REMOVE.description: True when this reference represents a removal request.

NORAD_CAT_ID.description: NORAD catalog id for satellite references when available.

OBJECT_ID.description: International designator or provider object id when available.

COUNTRY.description: Country or owner label associated with the reference.

SOURCES.description: Source labels or URIs that produced this reference.

DATA_MODES.description: Data-mode labels associated with this reference.

TLES.description: TLE provenance and raw lines for satellite references.

MEAN_ELEMENTS.description: Mean orbital elements associated with this reference.

STATES.description: State vectors associated with this reference.

MANEUVERS.description: Maneuver records associated with this reference.

SITE.description: Ground-site record associated with this reference.

SENSOR.description: Sensor record associated with this reference.

SENSOR_SYSTEM_ID.description: Sensor system id for references that identify a sensor by id.

SENSOR_ID.description: Sensor id for references that identify a sensor by id.

SITE_LATITUDE_DEG.description: Ground-site latitude in degrees when no SIT record is available.

SITE_LONGITUDE_DEG.description: Ground-site longitude in degrees when no SIT record is available.

VARIABLE_SATELLITE_ID.description: Scenario variable id for variable satellite references.

VARIABLE_SITE_ID.description: Scenario variable id for variable site references.

POINTS.description: Points of interest associated with this reference.

VIEW_CONE.description: View-cone overlay associated with this reference.

SUN_ADVANTAGE_TARGET.description: Sun-advantage target pairing for this reference.

EXCLUSION_ZONE.description: Exclusion-zone geometry associated with this reference.

OBSERVATION_EO.description: Electro-optical observation record associated with this reference.

OBSERVATION_RADAR.description: Radar observation record associated with this reference.

SCNReference.description: Scene reference that binds viewer-scene state to existing SDS domain records without duplicating those records.

EVENT_ID.description: Stable id for the imported scenario event.

ELSETS.description: Element sets associated with the event.

STATES.description: State vectors associated with the event.

EO_OBSERVATIONS.description: Electro-optical observations associated with the event.

RADAR_OBSERVATIONS.description: Radar observations associated with the event.

SCNEvent.description: Imported scenario event payload composed from existing SDS records.

ADDED_SATELLITES.description: Satellite references added by the asset-change event.

ADDED_GROUND_SITES.description: Ground-site references added by the asset-change event.

REMOVED_SATELLITES.description: Satellite references removed by the asset-change event.

REMOVED_GROUND_SITES.description: Ground-site references removed by the asset-change event.

SATELLITES.description: Current satellite references after the asset-change event.

GROUND_SITES.description: Current ground-site references after the asset-change event.

REFERENCES.description: Current full reference set after the asset-change event.
Objects, annotations, and variables included in the scenario.

EVENT.description: Imported event payload associated with the scenario.

FOCUSED_REFERENCE_INDEX.description: Zero-based focused reference index, or -1 when no index is focused.

FOCUSED_REFERENCE_ID.description: Reference id of the currently focused scenario object.

SIM_TIME.description: Current simulation time as an ISO-8601 UTC timestamp.

USE_ECEF_FRAME.description: True when the viewer should use an Earth-centered Earth-fixed frame.

REFERENCE_FRAME.description: Reference frame used for scenario propagation and display.

ACTION.description: Command action requested for the scenario.

VIEW_STATE.description: Viewer camera and display state for the scenario.

ASSETS_CHANGED.description: Asset-change notification payload for the scenario.

SCN.description: Scenario - canonical scene composition and simulation state for external scenario controls integrations. Domain records remain in their native SDS schemas and are referenced or embedded here only as scenario content.

REQUEST_ID.description: Request correlation id echoed by the matching state response.

REQUEST_KIND.description: State payload requested by the caller.

SCCRequestState.description: Request current state from a scenario controls host.

REQUEST_ID.description: Request correlation id from the matching state request.

REQUEST_KIND.description: State payload represented by this response.

SCENARIO.description: Full scenario state for scenario-state responses.

FOCUSED_REFERENCE_INDEX.description: Zero-based focused reference index, or -1 when no index is focused.

ERROR_MESSAGE.description: Human-readable error message when state cannot be returned.

SCCStateResponse.description: State response. SCENARIO carries full scenario state; REFERENCES can carry the lighter reference-list response for reference-only requests.

REQUEST_ID.description: Request correlation id for the asset-picker exchange.

CATALOG_TAB.description: Initial catalog tab to display in the asset picker.

ACKNOWLEDGED.description: True when the receiver accepted or completed the picker request.

READY.description: True when the scenario controls surface is ready for messages.

MESSAGE_KIND.description: Payload discriminator for the message carried by this envelope.

TRACE_ID.description: Optional trace id for correlating messages across systems.

SCENARIOS.description: Scenario list carried by setup or selection messages.

SCENARIO.description: Single scenario payload carried by setup or state messages.

SCC.description: Scenario Controls - message-bus envelope for scenario setup, state requests/responses, startup readiness, and asset-picker delegation.
